sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 142:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 142:1
items.html: When she is only the phase of a record that remained from the time of first departure, and she is without light, she is therefore equalized with the male that is extended from the coupling of ZON of Hochma, which is full of light. (Inner Light, Item‎ 46)
